data.body:
[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick Up Recruitment will begin on 11/1 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Miyako

Pick Up Recruitment Period: 11/1 (Tue) After Maintenance – 11/15 (Tue) 02:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance
![KGz1K3Z0yPwZeUaWTaXMPc7mF6EBauw7.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/KGz1K3Z0yPwZeUaWTaXMPc7mF6EBauw7.jpg)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule Change Notice]

3★ Miyako Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule has been changed as follows.
Thank you for your understanding.

Pick-Up Recruitment Period: 11/8 (Tue) After Maintenance – 11/22 (Tue) 01:59 (UTC)
